calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cynthia Lee for Petitioner.

Ms. Lee stated that the amended order was signed by Judge Busch on November 19th and filed on November 22nd. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Continued To Dec-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Nov-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cynthia Lee for Wilson Ng.

The Court stated that it is still waiting for the ex parte petition to amend the order. Ms. Lee stated that it was filed on September 26, 2017, that copies were sent on October 18th and again on November 2nd, and that she spoke with Ms. Trowbridge this morning and was told it would be resolved this coming Monday or Tuesday. The Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel is continued to November 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
